data.label: 爱加密

data.description: 针对目前移动应用普遍存在的破解、篡改、劫持、盗版、数据窃取、钓鱼欺诈等各类安全风险，通过行业领先的第六代加固技术，爱加密为用户提供全面的移动应用加固加密技术和攻击防范服务。

data.label: 爱加密

data.description: Through the industry's leading sixth-generation reinforcement technology, IEncrypt provides users with comprehensive mobile application reinforcement encryption technology and attack prevention services, addressing various security risks commonly found in mobile applications, such as cracking, tampering, hijacking, piracy, data theft, and phishing fraud.
